title: Plato Revealed THIS Secret About Atlantis...
summary: This interview excerpt discusses Plato's account of Atlantis, tracing the origin of the story through his ancestor Solon, who allegedly learned about the lost civilization from Egyptian priests at the Temple of Neith around 600 BC.

events.description: Solon made a documented visit to Egypt and visited a Temple dedicated to the goddess Neith at Sais in the Delta, where priests showed him inscriptions about Atlantis

key_claims.claim: Plato is the earliest surviving reference to the lost civilization of Atlantis
Plato's source for the Atlantis story was his ancestor Solon, separated by about 200 years
Solon visited a Temple dedicated to the goddess Neith at Sais in Egypt around 600 BC
Egyptian priests showed Solon inscriptions describing a highly advanced former civilization that was destroyed in a single day and night and swallowed by the sea
